paper.title: Handoff Debt: The Rediscovery Cost When Coding Agents Take Over Interrupted Tasks

checks: The downloaded object is a readable PDF 1.7 document; pdfinfo reports 16 pages, the title, and both authors.

The layout-preserving extraction is non-empty and contains the abstract, methods, results, limitations, references, reproducibility appendix, complete takeover prompt and handoff schemas, observed failure modes, and AI-assistant disclosure through manuscript page 16.

The immutable arXiv source archive passed tar inventory and extraction checks. Its 32 regular files include the main manuscript, section sources, nine result-table fragments, four figure PDFs, bibliography, reproducibility details, diagnostics, and prompt/schema appendices.
The arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
warnings: The file utility reports a 12-page PDF document while pdfinfo and the extracted manuscript page boundaries report 16 pages; the index uses pdfinfo and verified manuscript boundaries.
pdftotext emitted embedded-font mismatch warnings but produced readable text through the final page.

official_release_search.paper_link_evidence: The immutable v1 manuscript and complete arXiv source contain no project, code, data, result, or supplemental-release URL. GitHub URLs in the bibliography point only to cited LangGraph and CrewAI projects; model links point to Hugging Face model pages.
searches: Exact paper title plus authors and code/dataset/GitHub web search
Exact arXiv ID plus GitHub web search
GitHub API scan of all public repositories returned for plausible author profiles dipeshhkc and kcdipesh
official_release_search.search_result_boundary: Search results found the arXiv record, third-party paper pages, and plausible author profiles, but no repository whose name or description referenced the paper, arXiv ID, handoff debt, takeover, rediscovery, coding agents, or SWE-bench. This records absence at acquisition time, not proof that no release exists or will later appear.
missing_for_reproduction: selected SWE-bench task identifiers and 181 handoff-point records
frozen repository checkpoints and predecessor trajectories
rendered raw-trace, summary-note, and structured-note payloads
exact runtime and serving configurations beyond manuscript descriptions
2,172 main takeover run records plus robustness and repeat-run records
official validation outputs, event/token ledgers, invalid or missing-run ledger, and analysis code

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the real immutable arXiv v1 PDF and source archive, extracted layout-preserving full text, and verified readable coverage through all appendices. Searched for an author-owned empirical release and recorded the current absence of one. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep review, experiment reproduction, statistical audit, endorsement of the paper's causal interpretation, or evidence of human handoff validity, professional realism, generalized benefit, capability, production fitness, or readiness.
review_handoff: Use the immutable v1 PDF/text and arXiv source tree for the queued deep review. Preserve the release ceiling: prompts, schemas, tables, and reproducibility prose are present in the source archive, but selected task identifiers, checkpoints, trajectories, rendered handoff payloads, run-level outcomes, invalid/missing records, and analysis code are not publicly verifiable from the acquired primary artifacts. Recheck author-owned release availability before final review if material.
local_storage_note: The PDF and arXiv source artifacts are ignored local evidence; the extracted full text, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
